nodes.name: Webhook — New Hire Form Submitted
nodes.notes: Triggered when a new hire submits the intake form via Google Forms or a custom portal. Receives name, email, role, department, manager, start date, location, and uploaded document URLs.

nodes.name: IF — Validate Required Fields
nodes.notes: Checks that the three minimum required fields are present before proceeding. If any are missing, the record is routed to the HR alert branch.

parameters.text: ⚠️ Incomplete onboarding intake received for {{ $json['full_name'] || 'Unknown' }}. Required fields are missing. Please review and resubmit.

nodes.name: Slack — Alert HR (Incomplete Record)
nodes.notes: Sends an alert to the HR Slack channel if the intake form is missing required fields. Workflow stops here until HR corrects and resubmits.

values.content: You are an HR onboarding assistant. Extract and validate the following fields from the submitted employee intake record: full_name, personal_email, job_title, department, manager_name, employment_type, start_date, location, signed_documents (list), missing_documents (list — expected: offer_letter, nda_signed, id_proof), and issues (list of problems or empty list). Return ONLY valid JSON with no explanation.

nodes.name: OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data
nodes.notes: Sends the intake form data to GPT-4o for structured extraction and validation. Returns a clean JSON record with all fields normalized and any issues flagged.

nodes.name: IF — Documents Complete?
nodes.notes: Routes the workflow based on whether all required documents have been submitted. If documents are missing, HR is notified and the workflow pauses.

parameters.text: ⚠️ Missing documents for {{ $node['Webhook — New Hire Form Submitted'].json['full_name'] }}. Missing: {{ $json['missing_documents'].join(', ') }}. Please follow up before onboarding can continue.

nodes.name: Slack — Alert HR (Missing Documents)
nodes.notes: Notifies HR of missing documents. Onboarding automation is paused until documents are received and the record is resubmitted or updated.

nodes.name: Airtable — Create Onboarding Record
nodes.notes: Creates the canonical onboarding record in Airtable. This record is the source of truth for all downstream steps and tracking.

values.content: You are an onboarding operations coordinator. Generate a complete onboarding task list based on the employee profile. For each task include: task_name, assigned_to (IT/HR/Manager/New Hire), due_offset (days relative to start date, negative = before start), priority (high/medium/low), and depends_on (array of task names). Return ONLY a JSON array.

nodes.name: OpenAI — Generate Task List
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o to generate a role and department specific task list. Output is a structured JSON array that feeds into task routing steps.

parameters.summary: New hire setup: {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['full_name'] }} ({{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['job_title'] }})
parameters.description:
New hire starting {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['start_date'] }}.

Required provisioning:
- MacBook Pro (or Windows if applicable)
- Company email account
- Slack, Jira, Figma, Google Workspace
- VPN access

Laptop must be ready 3 business days before start date.

nodes.name: Jira — Create IT Provisioning Ticket
nodes.notes: Creates an IT provisioning ticket in Jira with all required hardware and software access details. Due date is automatically set to 3 business days before the employee's start date.

values.content: You are a friendly onboarding guide. Write a personalized first-week onboarding plan for the new hire. Include: warm welcome by name, Day 1 logistics, first-week priorities (3-5 items), key contacts table, recommended tools to explore, required compliance items with checkboxes, and a note about their 30-day check-in. Format in markdown. Tone: warm, clear, encouraging.

nodes.name: OpenAI — Generate Onboarding Plan
nodes.notes: Generates a personalized, markdown-formatted onboarding plan tailored to the employee's role, department, location, and manager. Output is stored in Notion and attached to the welcome email.

parameters.title: Onboarding Plan — {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['full_name'] }} ({{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['start_date'] }})

nodes.name: Notion — Store Onboarding Plan
nodes.notes: Saves the AI-generated onboarding plan as a Notion page inside the Onboarding Plans database. The page is linked to the Airtable record.

parameters.subject: Welcome to the team, {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['full_name'].split(' ')[0] }}! 🎉
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['full_name'].split(' ')[0] }},

We are so excited to have you joining us as {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['job_title'] }} on {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['start_date'] }}.

Your manager {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['manager_name'] }} will be in touch shortly to welcome you and share what to expect on Day 1.

Your personalized onboarding plan is available here: {{ $node['Notion — Store Onboarding Plan'].json['url'] }}

We cannot wait to see what you will accomplish with us.

— The People & Operations Team

nodes.name: Gmail — Send Welcome Email to New Hire
nodes.notes: Sends a personalized welcome email to the new hire's personal email address. Includes a link to their Notion onboarding plan.

parameters.subject: Your new hire starts {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['start_date'] }}: {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['full_name'] }}
parameters.message:
Hi {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['manager_name'] }},

{{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['full_name'] }} is joining your team as {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['job_title'] }} on {{ $node['OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data'].json['start_date'] }}. All documents have been verified.

Action items for you:
- Schedule a Day 1 welcome call
- Arrange a team introduction by end of Week 1
- Share any team-specific resources or projects

IT provisioning is underway. All access should be ready by Day 1.

— HR Operations

nodes.name: Gmail — Send Manager Briefing
nodes.notes: Sends a concise briefing email to the hiring manager with the new hire's details, pending action items, and IT status.

nodes.name: Airtable — Update Record Status
nodes.notes: Updates the Airtable onboarding record with the final status and links to the Notion plan and Jira IT ticket. This closes the main workflow and sets up milestone tracking.

nodes.name: Slack — Notify HR Onboarding Complete
nodes.notes: Posts a summary to the HR onboarding Slack channel confirming that the workflow completed successfully, with links to the onboarding plan and IT ticket.

main.node: OpenAI — Extract and Validate Intake Data
Gmail — Send Welcome Email to New Hire

meta.description: End-to-end AI-powered employee onboarding automation. Handles intake, AI extraction, document validation, task generation, onboarding plan creation, and multi-channel communications.
